'''Sinkar''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Lawreys system]] in the [[Fakir sector/Legends|Fakir sector]]. It was a cold and inhospitable world with heavy [[Gravity/Legends|gravity]], and the [[Oxygen/Legends|oxygen]] supply was frozen on the surface. Extremely hostile to life, it was nonetheless the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Sinkar (species)|Sinkar]]. The Sinkar were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Helium/Legends|helium]]-based [[Slug (creature)/Legends|slugs]] that lived on [[Star/Legends|solar]] energy and impurities in the planet's oxygen blanket. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] established a [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]] on Sinkar during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="CP" />
